name: CSR Organisation of the Year
description: This nomination is for an organisation that has demonstrated exceptional leadership in Corporate Social Responsibility; one that goes beyond compliance to drive impactful initiatives, responsible business practices, and measurable contributions to society and the environment.

fields.label: Do you reside in Redemption City?
Describe how the organisation has integrated CSR into its core business strategy. What long-term goals or values drive their CSR efforts?
Explain how the organisation's CSR initiatives have directly impacted Redemption City (healthcare, education, employment, etc.).
Describe how the organisation communicates and reports its CSR efforts (annual reports, impact assessments, stakeholder involvement).
Highlight any creative or innovative approaches the organisation has used to address social or environmental challenges.
